source: Mock Depop + Instagram style tag snapshot (Spring 2026)

default.summary: Vintage layering and relaxed streetwear silhouettes are trending across sizes.

XS.summary: Y2K baby tees and fitted cottagecore pieces are hot in XS–S right now.

S.summary: Y2K graphic tops and soft vintage finds dominate small-size feeds.

M.summary: Grunge layering — flannels, track jackets, and boxy tees — is peaking in M.

L.summary: Oversized graphic tees and grunge-inspired layering are trending in L.

XL.summary: Oversized streetwear and heavy layering pieces are getting the most saves in XL.

8.summary: Chunky boots and 90s streetwear footwear are trending in women's 8.
